parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model:"gpt-4",messages:[{role:"system",content:"You are an expert Instagram content strategist. Analyze the performance data and provide exactly 5 specific, actionable recommendations. Label each as HIGH IMPACT, MEDIUM IMPACT, or LOW EFFORT. Cover: 1) Content type mix, 2) Hook/caption style, 3) Best topics, 4) Story improvements, 5) Timing/scheduling. Be specific with numbers.And give the recommendation in simple and clearer .Do not give the messy shit only provide simple and undersatandable and usable recommendation"},{role:"user",content:"Weekly performance data: "+JSON.stringify($json)}],temperature:0.7,max_tokens:1000}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "gpt-4",
  messages: [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: "You are an expert Instagram growth strategist. You give short, clear and practical advice."
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content:
        "Content Data (stringified JSON): " + $json.codeNodeData +
        "\n\nMetrics Data (stringified JSON): " + $json.trackMetricsData +
        "\n\nInstructions:\n" +
        "1. Analyze both content and performance metrics.\n" +
        "2. Give EXACTLY 5 bullet point recommendations.\n" +
        "3. Each bullet must start with HIGH IMPACT, MEDIUM IMPACT, or LOW EFFORT.\n" +
        "4. Keep each bullet short and concise.\n" +
        "5. No explanations. No paragraphs. Only 5 bullets.\n" +
        "6. Cover:\n" +
        "   - Content type mix\n" +
        "   - Hook and caption style\n" +
        "   - Best topics\n" +
        "   - Story improvements\n" +
        "   - Timing and scheduling\n\n" +
        "After the 5 bullet points, return ONLY this JSON:\n" +
        "{\n" +
        "  \"CaptionLength\": number,\n" +
        "  \"HashtagCount\": number,\n" +
        "  \"CallToAction\": \"string\",\n" +
        "  \"ProductFeatured\": true or false\n" +
        "}\n\n" +
        "Important:\n" +
        "- ProductFeatured must be boolean true or false.\n" +
        "- Do NOT return product name.\n" +
        "- Do NOT add extra text before or after JSON.\n" +
        "- Output format: 5 bullets first, then JSON only."
    }
  ],
  temperature: 0.5,
  max_tokens: 700
}) }}

data.name: reach
data.title: Accounts reached
data.description: The number of unique accounts that have seen this carousel container, at least once. Reach is different from impressions, which may include multiple views of your carousel container by the same accounts. This metric is estimated.

data.name: likes
data.title: Likes
data.description: The number of likes on your post.

data.name: comments
data.title: Comments
data.description: The number of comments on your post.

data.name: shares
data.title: Shares
data.description: The number of shares of your post.

data.name: saved
data.title: Saved
data.description: The number of saves of your post.

data.name: total_interactions
data.title: Post interactions
data.description: The number of likes, saves, comments and shares on your post minus the number of unlikes, unsaves and deleted comments.

message.content:
HIGH IMPACT: Diversify content type to include videos and carousels for higher engagement.
MEDIUM IMPACT: Use a more engaging hook and caption, incorporating a question or call to action.
HIGH IMPACT: Experiment with different topics, trending styles or hair care tips could attract more attention.
MEDIUM IMPACT: Incorporate stories to highlight customer testimonials or behind-the-scenes content.
LOW EFFORT: Experiment with posting times, consider peak user activity times for better reach.

{"CaptionLength": 28, "HashtagCount": 10, "CallToAction": "Book your appointment today", "ProductFeatured": true}
